channel.title: NUZU News
channel.description: NUZU: Real News in Real Time. Breaking headlines from 200+ trusted sources.

item.title: Champion South Lyon United lacrosse ends regular season undefeated - Yahoo Sports

There will be more Margo, but hopefully less money troubles. Apple TV has renewed ‘Margo’s Got Money Troubles,’ starring Elle Fanning and created by David E. Kelley, Eva Anderson and more, for a second season. See more details here: https://deadline.co - facebook.com

The Adam Sandler comedy franchise ‘Grown Ups’ is expanding, with ‘Grown Ups 3’ in the works at Netflix, the company announced during their Upfront presentation on Wednesday. More details here: https://deadline.com/2026/05/grown-ups-3-netflix-upfront-a - facebook.com
China 'very disappointed' with Europe's planned investment restrictions, diplomat says, China News - AsiaOne
From fragility to fortitude: Can Sri Lanka emerge stronger from the Middle East crisis? - Daily FT
Dangerous Hormuz deadlock: Who gives way first as Iran tightens its grip on the Strait? - Gulf News
How a rival became one of Takaichi’s most trusted allies - The Japan Times

Japan warns nationals not to engage in child exploitation in Indonesia - Japan Wire by Kyodo News
Russia to fulfil all agreements on energy supply to India: FM Lavrov - The Hindu
